TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Abdel Fattah el-Sisi = Sedki Sobhi pa taxa Cyangcyun Ijibuto . Kngkawas 2012 idas 8 diyax 12 cida, wada phyuwan heytay Cong Canmocang ka Sedki Sobhi, kiya ka muda rmirih wada plaxan ka Sami Anan, kiya uri u hnyuwan niya Sedki Sobhi heytay pa snpeyyah Congwey kasi mkala Sawcyang. Kngkawas 2014 idas 3 diyax 26, Ijibuto Rinji Soto Mansur u muda pbatas pnsdhuwan Soto, psdhu ucwang butay Cong Canmocang ISedki Sobhi ka psdhuwan Kwohwangbu Bucyo, rmirih wada malax qpahun Kwohwangbu Bucyo ka Saysi. Sedki Sobhi u diyax cida daw mniq Sotohu muda psdhuwan phiyu qpahun, mndungus bay lmutuc Saysi mi ngalan ucwang butay Congsring mi Kwphwangbu Bucyo. Pnyahan bnatas Lituk Teymu
S.PHON: = abd…ôl *attańß …ôl-sisi = s…ôdki sobńßi pa taxa ¶jaŇč ¶jun i…üibuto . kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** ¶ida, wada pńßjuwan ńß…ôtaj ¶oŇč ¶anmo ¶aŇč ka s…ôdki sobńßi, kija ka muda …ĺmi…ĺińß wada plaxan ka sami anan, kija u…ĺi u ńßnjuwan nija s…ôdki sobńßi ńß…ôtaj pa snp…ôjańß ¶oŇčw…ô kasi mkala saw ¶jaŇč. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, i…üibuto …ĺin…üi soto mansu…ĺ u muda pbatas pnsdńßuwan soto, psdńßu u ¶waŇč butaj ¶oŇč ¶anmo ¶aŇč is…ôdki sobńßi ka psdńßuwan kwońßwaŇčbu bu ¶jo, …ĺmi…ĺińß wada malax qpańßun kwońßwaŇčbu bu ¶jo ka sajsi. s…ôdki sobńßi u dijax ¶ida daw mniq sotońßu muda psdńßuwan pńßiju qpańßun, mnduŇčus baj lmutu ¶ sajsi mi Ňčalan u ¶waŇč butaj ¶oŇčs…ĺiŇč mi kwpńßwaŇčbu bu ¶jo. pnjańßan bnatas lituk t…ômu
S.FORM: = Abdel Fattah el-Sisi = Sedki Sobhi pa taxa Cyangcyun Ijibuto . Kngkawas 2012 idas 8 diyax 12 cida, wada phyuwan heytay Cong Canmocang ka Sedki Sobhi, kiya ka muda rmirih wada plaxan ka Sami Anan, kiya uri u hnyuwan niya Sedki Sobhi heytay pa snpeyyah Congwey kasi mkala Sawcyang. Kngkawas 2014 idas 3 diyax 26, Ijibuto Rinji Soto Mansur u muda pbatas pnsdhuwan Soto, psdhu ucwang butay Cong Canmocang ISedki Sobhi ka psdhuwan Kwohwangbu Bucyo, rmirih wada malax qpahun Kwohwangbu Bucyo ka Saysi. Sedki Sobhi u diyax cida daw mniq Sotohu muda psdhuwan phiyu qpahun, mndungus bay lmutuc Saysi mi ngalan ucwang butay Congsring mi Kwphwangbu Bucyo. Pnyahan bnatas Lituk Teymu
S.PHON: = abd…ôl *attańß …ôl-sisi = s…ôdki sobńßi pa taxa ¶jaŇč ¶jun i…üibuto . kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** ¶ida, wada pńßjuwan ńß…ôtaj ¶oŇč ¶anmo ¶aŇč ka s…ôdki sobńßi, kija ka muda …ĺmi…ĺińß wada plaxan ka sami anan, kija u…ĺi u ńßnjuwan nija s…ôdki sobńßi ńß…ôtaj pa snp…ôjańß ¶oŇčw…ô kasi mkala saw ¶jaŇč. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, i…üibuto …ĺin…üi soto mansu…ĺ u muda pbatas pnsdńßuwan soto, psdńßu u ¶waŇč butaj ¶oŇč ¶anmo ¶aŇč is…ôdki sobńßi ka psdńßuwan kwońßwaŇčbu bu ¶jo, …ĺmi…ĺińß wada malax qpańßun kwońßwaŇčbu bu ¶jo ka sajsi. s…ôdki sobńßi u dijax ¶ida daw mniq sotońßu muda psdńßuwan pńßiju qpańßun, mnduŇčus baj lmutu ¶ sajsi mi Ňčalan u ¶waŇč butaj ¶oŇčs…ĺiŇč mi kwpńßwaŇčbu bu ¶jo. pnjańßan bnatas lituk t…ômu
